chapter_title.en: Reward of fulfilling a desire of a Muslim

text: أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع مَا قَضَی مُسْلِمٌ لِمُسْلِمٍ حَاجَهً إِلَّا نَادَاهُ اللَّهُ عَلَیَّ ثَوَابُکَ وَ لَا أَرْضَی لَکَ بِدُونِ الْجَنَّهِ.

en.sayed-athar-husain-rizvi-&-sayed-maqs: 1.  Imam Ja’far Sadiq (a.s.) said, “One who fulfils a desire of a Muslim brother, Allah calls out to the former, ‘Your reward is  with  Me  and  I  won’t  be  satisfied  unless  I  send  you  to Paradise.”
